description_long: This is a floor-standing bookcase with a dark wood frame and three open wire shelves, plus a solid base shelf. The sides and back panel are constructed from a wood-like material, providing structural support and a clean, modern appearance. The shelves are made of black metal wire grids, allowing for airflow and visibility of stored items. The overall design is sturdy and functional, suitable for displaying books or merchandise in urban environments such as shops, libraries, or public spaces. The back panel is solid, while the front and sides are open for easy access to the shelves. The finish is smooth and matte, with a dark brown and black color palette.
description: A modern, floor-standing bookcase with a dark wood frame and three black wire shelves plus a solid base. The design is open and functional, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the three wire shelves and solid base, with the wood panel forming the side support.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid dark wood back panel, with no shelves visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side, showing the three wire shelves and solid base.
description_view_3: Front view revealing all three wire shelves and the solid base, with open access to each shelf.
